title: cassia rotundifolia var. bauhiniifolia
intro: Cassia rotundifolia var. bauhiniifolia, also known as the Bauhinia cassia, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is a tropical plant native to the Indian subcontinent, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia cassia include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. Bauhinia cassia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
